name: Triple Flag Precious Metals Corp.
description: Triple Flag Precious Metals Corp. is a gold-focused streaming and royalty company that offers shareholders exposure to precious metals through a diversified portfolio of assets. The company provides financing solutions to the mining industry by entering into long-term agreements to purchase a percentage of metal production or by acquiring royalties on mining projects. Its portfolio is primarily centered on gold and silver, with assets located in mining-friendly jurisdictions such as Australia, Canada, and the Americas. Triple Flag focuses on high-quality, long-life mines and projects operated by established mining companies to deliver sustainable growth and value.
